privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Grid Collection puzzle game.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Grid Collection

sections.p: At GRID, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile puzzle game application.

We collect game progress data, including levels completed, scores, achievements, gameplay statistics, and purchase history. This data is stored locally on your device and synced to our cloud servers using Firebase. To save and restore your progress we sign you in automatically through Game Center (iOS) or Google Play Games (Android); we receive only a player identifier from these services — not your email address, name, or any other personal profile information. We also collect diagnostic data and crash reports to help us identify and fix issues in the game. Diagnostic data and crash reports include your player identifier so we can match issues to affected players; they never include your name or email address.

We use your game progress data to provide game functionality and to back up and restore your progress on the same platform. We use purchase data to manage in-app purchases and restore purchases when needed. We use diagnostic data to identify and fix bugs, improve game stability, and enhance user experience. We do not use your game progress data for advertising or marketing purposes, though third-party advertising partners may use device identifiers for ad serving.

Your game data is stored locally on your device using secure local storage and is automatically synced to the cloud using Firebase services. We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

We use various third-party services to provide and improve our game. These include Apple Game Center and Google Play Games for automatic sign-in and progress backup; Firebase (Google) for authentication, cloud storage, and security; Firebase Crashlytics (Google) for diagnostic and crash reports; RevenueCat for managing in-app purchases; and Google AdMob for displaying advertisements. These services have their own privacy policies governing the collection and use of your information. We encourage you to review their privacy policies. We also use Firebase Analytics (Google) to collect aggregated gameplay and usage statistics that help us improve the game.

Our game is intended for users aged 8 and above. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 8. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child under 8 has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Because the game signs you in automatically through Game Center or Google Play Games and does not require you to create an account with an email or password, there is no in-app account to manage or delete. To request deletion of your data, contact us at the email address below and we will erase your data from our databases and connected third-party services (such as RevenueCat).

We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services and fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy. When you request deletion of your data, we will remove your personal information from our servers and connected third-party platforms, except where we are required to retain it for legal or regulatory purposes.

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at {email}.
Last updated: June 2026

terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service for Grid Collection puzzle game.
terms.title: Terms of Service - Grid Collection

sections.p: By downloading, installing, or using GRID, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our application.
GRID is a puzzle game application. You may use the app for personal, non-commercial purposes. You agree not to modify, reverse engineer, or create derivative works based on the app.

GRID signs you in automatically using Game Center on iOS or Google Play Games on Android, so your progress is backed up and restored on the same platform without creating an account or providing an email. There is no in-app account to create or manage. Your progress data is stored locally on your device and synced to cloud servers. You are responsible for all activities that occur under your identity.

You agree not to: (a) use the app for any unlawful purpose; (b) attempt to hack or disrupt the app's functionality; (c) share your account with others; (d) use automated tools to interact with the app.
All content, features, and functionality of GRID are owned by us and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
GRID is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the app will be error-free or continuously available.
In no event shall we be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with your use of GRID.
We may terminate or suspend your access to GRID at any time, without prior notice, for any reason, including breach of these Terms of Service.
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at {email}.

GRID offers in-app purchases for consumable and non-consumable items. Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at the confirmation of purchase. All purchases are one-time payments and we do not offer any recurring subscriptions. You can restore your non-consumable purchases at any time within the app.

This agreement is concluded between you and us, and not with Apple. We are solely responsible for the application and its content. Apple has no obligation whatsoever to furnish any maintenance and support services with respect to the application. Apple is not responsible for addressing any claims by you or any third party relating to the application.
Last updated: June 2026
